title: justicia odora
intro: Justicia odora, also known as the fragrant justicia or sweet basilia, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Justicia odora include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Justicia odora include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or infusing them in oil for topical use.
